hooks.command: input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; recap="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/Recap.md"; { [ -f "$recap" ] && [ -n "$(find "$recap" -mmin -2 2>/dev/null)" ]; } && exit 0; printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Before finishing: update Recap.md at the repository root with a super-short 3-5 sentence summary of what the project is and the most recent work done, then stop."}'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking Recap.md is up to date…
